modules.module_title: Introduction to Influencer Marketing & Social Media Platforms
Legal, Ethical & Disclosure Guidelines in Influencer Marketing

questions.question: Influencer Marketing kya hai?

options.A: Ek tarah ki digital advertising jahan brands famous logon ke through apne products promote karte hain.
options.B: Offline marketing jahan pamphlets distribute kiye jaate hain.

questions.explanation: Influencer Marketing ek digital marketing strategy hai jismein brands social media influencers ke saath collaborate karke apne products ya services ko promote karte hain.

questions.question: Nano-influencer ki typical follower range kya hoti hai?

options.B: 1M se zyada

questions.explanation: Nano-influencers woh hote hain jinke followers 1,000 se 10,000 tak hote hain. Inki engagement rate aksar kaafi high hoti hai.

questions.question: Kis social media platform par influencer marketing sabse zyada popular hai visual content ke liye?

options.B: Twitter

questions.explanation: Instagram apne visual-centric nature (photos, videos, stories, reels) ki wajah se influencer marketing ke liye sabse popular platforms mein se ek hai.

questions.question: Engagement Rate ko kaise calculate kiya jaata hai?

options.B: (Likes + Comments + Shares) / Followers * 100

questions.explanation: Engagement Rate ek metric hai jo audience ke content ke saath interaction ko maapta hai. Iska calculation (Likes + Comments + Shares) / Followers * 100 hota hai.

questions.question: Influencer marketing ka brand ke liye kya primary benefit hai?

options.A: Sirf product ki price kam karna
options.B: New audience tak pahunch aur brand trust build karna
options.C: Company ke internal operations ko streamline karna

questions.explanation: Influencer marketing brands ko naye audiences tak pahunchne aur influencers ke followers ke beech credibility aur trust build karne mein madad karta hai.

questions.question: Micro-influencer ke followers ki sankhya generally kitni hoti hai?

options.B: 10K se 100K

questions.explanation: Micro-influencers ke followers generally 10,000 se 100,000 ke beech hote hain. Inka audience niche aur highly engaged hota hai.

questions.question: Youtube kis tarah ke content ke liye sabse best platform hai influencer marketing mein?

options.B: Long-form video reviews aur tutorials

questions.explanation: YouTube long-form video content jaise product reviews, unboxings, tutorials, aur vlogs ke liye ideal hai.

questions.question: Ek influencer ki 'niche' kya define karti hai?

options.B: Unka geographic location
options.C: Woh specific area ya topic jismein unke paas expertise aur interest hai

questions.explanation: Influencer ki niche woh specific topic ya interest area hota hai jismein woh content create karte hain aur jismein unki audience interested hoti hai, jaise 'beauty', 'travel', 'tech'.

questions.question: Influencer marketing mein 'Reach' ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: Kitne logon ne content par comment kiya
options.B: Kitne unique logon ne content dekha
options.C: Kitne logon ne content share kiya

questions.explanation: Reach batata hai ki kitne unique accounts tak aapka content pahuncha. Ye impressions se alag hai jo total views count karta hai (ek hi user multiple times dekh sakta hai).

questions.question: Brands kis tarah ke influencers ko prefer karte hain jab unka budget limited ho lekin high engagement chahiye ho?

options.B: Mega-influencers

questions.explanation: Nano aur Micro-influencers ka audience smaller aur niche hota hai, jiske karan unki engagement rate aksar kaafi high hoti hai aur woh budget-friendly bhi hote hain.

questions.question: TikTok kis tarah ke content ke liye jaana jaata hai?

options.B: Short-form, engaging video content

questions.explanation: TikTok short-form, creative aur entertaining video content ke liye bahut popular hai, jismein trends, challenges aur music ka use hota hai.

questions.question: Ek influencer ki 'authenticity' ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Woh kitne brands ke saath kaam karta hai.
options.C: Uska content genuine, original aur uski personality ke saath align karta hai.

questions.explanation: Authenticity ka matlab hai ki influencer ka content real, honest aur uski apni beliefs aur style ko reflect karta hai, jisse audience ka trust bana rehta hai.

questions.question: Agar ek brand ka target audience professionals hain, toh kaun sa platform sabse zyada effective hoga influencer marketing ke liye?

options.B: Instagram

questions.explanation: LinkedIn professional networking aur B2B (Business-to-Business) influencer marketing ke liye sabse upyukt platform hai, jahan professionals ek dusre se connect karte hain.

questions.question: Influencer marketing mein 'Impressions' ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: Kitne logon ne content par click kiya.
options.B: Kitne logon ne content purchase kiya.
options.C: Kitni baar content screen par dikhaya gaya (ek hi user ko kai baar bhi dikh sakta hai).
options.D: Kitne logon ne content save kiya.

questions.explanation: Impressions total number of times hain jab aapka content kisi screen par dikhaya gaya. Ek hi user ko multiple impressions mil sakte hain.

questions.question: Influencer marketing ka future trend kya ho sakta hai?

options.B: AI-powered influencer identification aur performance tracking
options.C: Digital se poora shift offline marketing mein
options.D: Influencers ke liye koi disclosure rules nahi honge

questions.explanation: AI aur machine learning influencer identification, campaign optimization aur performance analysis mein ek major role play kar sakte hain, jisse campaigns aur efficient banenge.

questions.question: Ek 'brand ambassador' aur ek one-time 'campaign influencer' mein kya main difference hai?

options.A: Brand ambassador sirf free products leta hai, influencer payment.
options.B: Brand ambassador long-term relationship mein hota hai aur multiple campaigns karta hai, jabki influencer short-term project ke liye hota hai.
options.C: Brand ambassador sirf celebrities hote hain, influencer koi bhi ho sakta hai.

questions.explanation: Brand ambassador ek long-term association mein hota hai jo brand ko regularly represent karta hai, jabki campaign influencer specific short-term campaigns ke liye engage kiya jaata hai.

questions.question: Kis factor ka influencer marketing mein ROI (Return on Investment) par sabse zyada impact hota hai?

options.B: Campaign ke goals ka clear hona aur target audience matching
options.D: Content mein kitne hashtags use kiye gaye

questions.explanation: Clear campaign goals aur sahi target audience matching se hi sahi influencers choose hote hain, jisse campaign effective banta hai aur ROI maximize hota hai.

questions.question: Influencer ko identify karne ka sabse pehla step kya hona chahiye?

options.B: Brand ke campaign goals aur target audience ko define karna.
options.D: Kisi bhi influencer ko randomly choose karna.

questions.explanation: Influencer search shuru karne se pehle, brand ke objectives aur kis audience tak pahunchna hai, yeh clear hona bahut zaroori hai.

questions.question: Influencer vetting mein 'audience demographics' check karna kyun important hai?

options.A: Influencer ki age janne ke liye.
options.B: Yeh confirm karne ke liye ki influencer ka audience brand ke target audience se match karta hai.
options.C: Influencer ki income janne ke liye.
options.D: Influencer ke friends ko janne ke liye.

questions.explanation: Audience demographics (age, gender, location, interests) check karna zaroori hai taaki yeh ensure kiya ja sake ki influencer ka audience brand ke ideal customer se align karta hai.

questions.question: Influencer identification ke liye kaun sa tool helpful ho sakta hai?

options.B: Influencer discovery platforms (jaise HypeAuditor, Upfluence)

questions.explanation: Influencer discovery platforms brands ko relevant influencers ko search, filter aur analyze karne mein madad karte hain unke niche, audience aur engagement ke basis par.

questions.question: Ek influencer ke profile par 'fake followers' hone ka 'red flag' kaise identify karenge?

options.B: Follower count bahut tezi se badhna, comments aur likes mein inconsistency.

questions.explanation: Agar follower count bahut zyada ho lekin comments aur likes bahut kam ya generic hon, toh yeh fake followers ka indication ho sakta hai.

questions.question: Influencer outreach mein sabse effective communication channel kaun sa hai?

options.B: Professional email ya through influencer agency contact karna.

questions.explanation: Professional email ya unki management agency ke through contact karna sabse formal aur effective tareeka hai collaboration proposals ke liye.

questions.question: Ek influencer ke 'past campaign performance' ko check karna kyun zaroori hai?

options.A: Unki personal life janne ke liye.
options.B: Yeh dekhne ke liye ki unhone pehle kitne paise kamaye hain.
options.C: Unki content quality, brand fit aur previous results ko analyze karne ke liye.
options.D: Unke competitors ko janne ke liye.

questions.explanation: Past campaign performance se influencer ki reliability, content creation capabilities aur previous collaborations ke results ka idea milta hai.

questions.question: Influencer vetting mein 'brand safety' ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: Influencer ke paas ek safe office hona.
options.B: Influencer ka content brand values ke saath align karta ho aur koi controversial ya damaging history na ho.
options.D: Influencer ka bank account safe ho.

questions.explanation: Brand safety ensure karta hai ki influencer ka content aur online persona brand ki image aur values ko negatively affect na kare.

questions.question: Influencer ko contact karte waqt email subject line mein kya mention karna chahiye?

options.B: Clear aur concise subject line jaise 'Collaboration Opportunity: [Brand Name] x [Influencer Name]'.

questions.explanation: Ek clear aur professional subject line influencer ka attention grab karta hai aur unko email ke content ka idea deta hai.

questions.question: Agar ek influencer ka engagement rate bahut kam hai uske follower count ke hisaab se, toh yeh kya indicate karta hai?

options.B: Uska content genuine aur uski audience engaged nahi hai, ya fir fake followers ho sakte hain.
options.D: Uske paas bahut zyada real followers hain.

questions.explanation: Low engagement rate high follower count ke bawajood indicate karta hai ki audience engaged nahi hai ya fir follower count artificial ho sakta hai.

questions.question: Influencer ke 'content quality' ko kaise evaluate karenge?

options.B: Uske visuals, storytelling, editing skills aur overall presentation ko dekh kar.

questions.explanation: Content quality mein visuals ki clarity, editing, storytelling ability aur message delivery sab shamil hota hai. High quality content audience ko engage karta hai.

questions.question: Influencer se contact karne ke baad, agar reply na aaye toh kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Ek polite follow-up email bhejna.
options.D: Unko social media par stalk karna.

questions.explanation: Ek polite follow-up email bhejna standard practice hai. Influencers busy ho sakte hain aur ho sakta hai unhone pehla email miss kar diya ho.

questions.question: Influencer ke 'audience insights' kahan se mil sakte hain?

options.B: Influencer ke social media platform ke analytics (Creator Studio, Instagram Insights) ya unse direct request karke.

questions.explanation: Most social media platforms influencers ko apne audience ke demographics aur engagement data tak pahunch dete hain. Brands direct influencers se yeh data request kar sakte hain.

questions.question: Influencer marketing mein 'exclusivity clause' ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: Influencer sirf ek hi brand ke saath kaam karega.
options.B: Influencer ko sirf expensive products milenge.
options.C: Influencer ko sirf kuch exclusive events mein invite kiya jayega.
options.D: Influencer ko kisi bhi brand ke saath kaam karne ki aazadi hogi.

questions.explanation: Exclusivity clause contract mein ek condition hoti hai jismein influencer ek specific period ke liye brand ke competitors ke saath kaam nahi kar sakta.

questions.question: Influencer ko select karte samay 'brand fit' ka kya mahatva hai?

options.A: Brand fit se koi fark nahi padta.
options.B: Influencer ka content aur values brand ke image aur message ke saath align hone chahiye, jisse partnership authentic lage.
options.C: Sirf influencer ki popularity dekhni chahiye.
options.D: Influencer ka naam brand ke naam se milta-julta hona chahiye.

questions.explanation: Brand fit bahut important hai kyunki agar influencer brand ke values aur image se match nahi karta, toh collaboration unnatural lag sakti hai aur audience ka trust kam ho sakta hai.

questions.question: Influencer outreach email mein kya shamil karna avoid karna chahiye?

options.A: Brand ka naam aur campaign idea.
options.B: Influencer ke kaam ki tareef.
options.C: Bahut zyada informal language aur spelling mistakes.

questions.explanation: Professional communication mein informal language aur errors avoid karne chahiye taaki aapka brand serious aur respectable lage.

questions.question: Agar ek influencer ka audience mostly ek alag country se hai, aur brand ka target market India hai, toh yeh kya indicate karta hai?

options.B: Yeh ek mismatch hai aur campaign effective nahi hoga.
options.C: Influencer ko apni country change karni chahiye.
options.D: Brand ko apna target market change karna chahiye.

questions.explanation: Agar influencer ka audience brand ke target geographic market se match nahi karta, toh campaign ka reach aur impact limited ho jayega.

questions.question: Influencer research ke time competitors ke saath influencer ki previous collaborations ko check karna kyun important hai?

options.A: Yeh dekhne ke liye ki influencer kitna loyal hai.
options.B: Yeh analyze karne ke liye ki unhone competitor ke liye kaisa content banaya aur uski performance kaisi rahi.
options.C: Influencer ko copy karne ke liye.
options.D: Apne competitors ke secrets janne ke liye.

questions.explanation: Competitors ke saath collaborations dekhne se influencer ki versatility, content style aur past performance ka idea milta hai, aur yeh bhi pata chalta hai ki woh kitna unique content create kar sakte hain.

questions.question: Influencer marketing campaign ka sabse pehla step kya hona chahiye?

options.B: Campaign ke goals aur objectives define karna.

questions.explanation: Kisi bhi campaign ki safalta ke liye goals (jaise brand awareness, sales, lead generation) ko clearly define karna sabse zaroori hai.

questions.question: Creative brief mein kya shamil hona chahiye?

options.B: Campaign goals, target audience, key message, deliverables aur brand guidelines.

questions.explanation: Creative brief ek comprehensive document hota hai jo influencer ko campaign ki saari zaroori jaankari provide karta hai taaki woh effective content create kar sake.

questions.question: Agar campaign ka goal 'Brand Awareness' hai, toh kaun se KPIs (Key Performance Indicators) par focus karna chahiye?

options.B: Website traffic

questions.explanation: Brand awareness campaigns ka aim zyada se zyada logon tak pahunchna hota hai, isliye Reach, Impressions aur brand mentions jaise metrics important hote hain.

questions.question: Influencer ko content create karne ki 'creative freedom' dena kyun faydemand hota hai?

options.A: Taki brand ka kaam kam ho.
options.B: Taki content authentic lage aur influencer ke style se match kare, jisse audience engagement badhe.
options.C: Taki influencer apni marzi se kuch bhi post kar sake.
options.D: Taki brand ko content review na karna pade.

questions.explanation: Creative freedom se influencer apne unique style mein content create kar pata hai, jo unki audience ke saath resonate karta hai aur zyada authentic lagta hai.

questions.question: Product launch ke liye kis tarah ka content format sabse effective ho sakta hai?

options.B: Detailed video review ya unboxing

questions.explanation: Video reviews aur unboxings naye products ko detail mein showcase karne aur unke features aur benefits explain karne ke liye bahut effective hote hain.

questions.question: Campaign strategy mein 'target audience' ko define karna kyun critical hai?

options.A: Taki influencer ko pata chale ki uske friends kaun hain.
options.B: Taki sahi influencers ko choose kiya ja sake aur message relevant audience tak pahunche.
options.C: Sirf marketing team ke liye zaroori hai.

questions.explanation: Target audience ko define karne se brands un influencers ko choose kar paate hain jinka audience unke ideal customers se match karta hai, jisse campaign ka impact badhta hai.

questions.question: Budget allocation karte samay kin factors ko consider karna chahiye?

options.B: Influencer fees, content creation costs, boosting ads, agency fees (agar applicable ho).

questions.explanation: Influencer marketing campaign ke budget mein influencer compensation, content production, paid promotion aur management fees jaise kayi components shamil hote hain.

questions.question: Ek effective creative brief ki kya characteristic honi chahiye?

options.B: Clear, concise aur actionable.
options.D: Influencer ko sab kuch khud decide karne ko kehna.

questions.explanation: Ek effective creative brief influencer ko saari zaroori jaankari clear aur concise tareeke se provide karta hai taaki woh brand ke expectations ko samajh sake.

questions.question: Influencer ko 'brand messaging' mein kya guidance deni chahiye?

options.B: Key messages, tone of voice aur brand ke core values ko clearly communicate karna.
options.C: Influencer ko koi guidance nahi deni chahiye.

questions.explanation: Clear brand messaging guidance se influencer brand ki identity ko sahi tareeke se convey kar paata hai, jisse consistency bani rehti hai.

questions.question: User-Generated Content (UGC) ka influencer marketing mein kya role hai?

options.A: UGC ka influencer marketing se koi sambandh nahi.
options.B: Influencer campaign se generate hua audience content brand ke liye UGC ban jaata hai, jo authenticity badhata hai.
options.C: UGC sirf brands khud banate hain.
options.D: UGC sirf negative feedback hota hai.

questions.explanation: Influencer campaigns aksar audience ko brand ke baare mein content create karne ke liye motivate karte hain, jo valuable UGC ban jaata hai aur social proof provide karta hai.

questions.question: Agar campaign ka goal 'Sales Conversion' hai, toh influencer ko kis tarah ka Call-to-Action (CTA) dena chahiye?

options.B: 'Check out my latest post'.
options.C: 'Shop now' with a direct link, 'Use code [DISCOUNT]' for a discount.

questions.explanation: Sales conversion ke liye direct aur measurable CTAs jaise 'Shop now' with a link ya 'Use discount code' bahut effective hote hain.

questions.question: Content calendar maintain karna kyun zaroori hai?

options.A: Taki brand ko pata na chale ki kab post karna hai.
options.B: Taki content publishing consistent rahe aur deadlines meet hon.
options.C: Sirf influencer ke liye zaroori hai.

questions.explanation: Content calendar se content ki planning, scheduling aur publishing organized rehti hai, jisse consistency aur timely delivery ensure hoti hai.

questions.question: Influencer marketing mein 'storytelling' ka kya mahatva hai?

options.A: Storytelling audience ko bore karta hai.
options.B: Stories emotional connection banati hain aur brand message ko zyada memorable banati hain.
options.C: Sirf children ki books mein storytelling zaroori hai.

questions.explanation: Effective storytelling audience ko engage karti hai, brand message ko relatable banati hai aur ek emotional connection create karti hai.

questions.question: Ek brand ke liye 'evergreen content' kya hota hai?

options.A: Content jo sirf ek din ke liye valid ho.
options.B: Content jo lambe samay tak relevant aur useful rehta hai, aur baar-baar dekha ja sakta hai.
options.C: Content jo trees ke baare mein ho.
options.D: Content jo sirf holidays mein publish ho.

questions.explanation: Evergreen content woh hota hai jo samay ke saath purana nahi hota aur consistently traffic aur engagement generate karta rehta hai, jaise tutorials, 'how-to' guides.

questions.question: Influencer ko product samples bhejne ka kya fayda hai?

options.B: Influencer ko product experience karne ka mauka milta hai, jisse woh authentic aur informed content create kar sake.
options.C: Sirf product ki storage kam karna.
options.D: Isse brand ka budget increase hota hai.

questions.explanation: Product samples provide karne se influencer ko product ko personally use aur experience karne ka mauka milta hai, jisse unka content zyada genuine aur convincing banta hai.

questions.question: Influencer brief mein 'do's and don'ts' include karna kyun important hai?

options.A: Influencer ko control karne ke liye.
options.B: Taki brand ki image aur guidelines maintain hon aur koi unwanted content publish na ho.
options.C: Influencer ko confuse karne ke liye.

questions.explanation: Do's and don'ts clear boundaries set karte hain aur ensure karte hain ki influencer ka content brand ke values aur messaging ke saath align kare, aur koi negative publicity na ho.

questions.question: Ek successful influencer campaign ke liye 'consistency' ka kya role hai?

options.A: Consistency se koi fark nahi padta.
options.B: Consistent messaging aur content publishing se audience ka trust build hota hai aur brand recall badhta hai.
options.D: Consistency se campaign ka budget kam hota hai.

questions.explanation: Consistent messaging aur regular content publishing se audience ko brand message baar-baar dikhta hai, jisse brand recall badhta hai aur trust develop hota hai.

questions.question: ASCI (Advertising Standards Council of India) guidelines influencer marketing mein kyun important hain?

options.A: Sirf influencers ki income regulate karne ke liye.
options.B: Consumers ko misleading ads se bachane aur transparent disclosures ensure karne ke liye.
options.C: Brands ko zyada tax dene ke liye.
options.D: Sirf social media platforms ko control karne ke liye.

questions.explanation: ASCI guidelines consumers ke hit mein hain, taaki unhe pata chale ki kaun sa content paid promotion hai aur kaun sa genuine review.

questions.question: Sponsored content ko disclose karne ke liye sabse common hashtag kya hai?

options.B: #Ad

questions.explanation: #Ad ya #Sponsored jaise hashtags sponsored content ko clearly identify karte hain, jo disclosure requirements ko satisfy karta hai.

questions.question: Agar ek influencer ko brand se free product mila hai promotion ke liye, toh use kya disclose karna chahiye?

options.A: Kuch bhi disclose nahi karna chahiye.
options.B: Yeh ki product free mein mila hai aur yeh ek paid promotion hai.

questions.explanation: ASCI aur FTC guidelines ke according, agar influencer ko compensation (monetary ya free product) mila hai, toh use clearly disclose karna zaroori hai.

questions.question: Influencer marketing mein 'intellectual property rights' ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Content (photos, videos, text) ka ownership aur uske use ke rights.

questions.explanation: Intellectual property rights decide karte hain ki influencer dwara banaye gaye content ka owner kaun hoga aur brand use kaise use kar sakta hai.

questions.question: Ek influencer contract mein 'scope of work' kya define karta hai?

options.B: Influencer ke deliverables (posts, stories, videos), platforms aur timelines.

questions.explanation: Scope of work clearly outlines karta hai ki influencer ko kya content create karna hai, kis platform par, aur kab tak submit/publish karna hai.

questions.question: ASCI guidelines ke according, disclosure hashtags jaise #ad kahan place hone chahiye?

options.A: Post ke end mein, chhote font mein.
options.B: Post ke title ya description ke shuru mein, clearly visible.

questions.explanation: Disclosures ko prominently display karna zaroori hai taaki average consumer unhe aasani se dekh aur samajh sake.

questions.question: Agar ek influencer brand ke baare mein galat information deta hai, toh iski zimmedari kiski hoti hai?

options.B: Brand aur influencer dono ki.

questions.explanation: Both the brand and the influencer are responsible for ensuring the accuracy of claims made in sponsored content. Brand ko influencer ke content ko review karna chahiye.

questions.question: Influencer marketing mein 'transparency' ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: Influencer ka ghar transparent hona chahiye.
options.B: Sponsored content ko clearly disclose karna aur audience ke saath honest rehna.
options.C: Sirf brand ke products transparent hon.
options.D: Influencer ko apne followers ko ignore karna chahiye.

questions.explanation: Transparency ka matlab hai ki audience ko pata hona chahiye ki kab koi content paid promotion hai, jisse trust bana rehta hai.

questions.question: FTC (Federal Trade Commission) guidelines kis country ke liye hain?

options.B: USA

questions.explanation: FTC guidelines United States mein influencer marketing disclosures ko regulate karti hain, although globally inka impact dekha jaata hai.

questions.question: Influencer contract mein 'payment terms' mein kya shamil hota hai?

options.B: Compensation amount, payment schedule aur payment method.
options.C: Sirf brand ka bank account number.

questions.explanation: Payment terms contract ka ek crucial part hai jo financial aspects ko clear karta hai, taaki koi confusion na ho.

questions.question: Agar ek influencer ka content minor audience ko target karta hai, toh kis tarah ke products ka promotion avoid karna chahiye?

options.B: Health drinks.

questions.explanation: Minor audience ko target karte samay, gambling, alcohol, tobacco ya adult-oriented products ka promotion strict regulations ke under aata hai aur aksar avoid kiya jaata hai.

questions.question: Influencer ko 'editorial control' dena aur 'brand control' maintain karna kaise balance kiya jaata hai?

options.A: Influencer ko poori aazadi dena aur brand ka koi control na hona.
options.B: Creative brief mein clearly guidelines dena, lekin final content review ka option rakhna.
options.C: Brand ko influencer ke har post ko khud likhna.
options.D: Influencer ko bina kisi brief ke kaam karne dena.

questions.explanation: Ek detailed creative brief aur final content approval process se brand apni messaging aur quality control maintain kar paata hai, jabki influencer ko creative freedom bhi milti hai.

questions.question: Influencer marketing mein 'copyright infringement' ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: Influencer ka content bahut accha hai.
options.B: Kisi aur ke copyrighted content ko bina permission ke use karna.
options.C: Sirf brand ke logo ko copy karna.

questions.explanation: Copyright infringement tab hota hai jab koi influencer bina permission ke kisi aur ke original creative work (music, images, videos) ka use karta hai.

questions.question: Ek 'morality clause' influencer contract mein kyun shamil ki jaati hai?

options.A: Influencer ko moral lessons sikhane ke liye.
options.B: Agar influencer ka public behavior brand ki image ko damage karta hai, toh partnership terminate karne ke liye.
options.C: Sirf influencer ko darane ke liye.
options.D: Influencer ko zyada paise dene ke liye.

questions.explanation: Morality clause brand ko protect karti hai agar influencer koi controversial act karta hai jo brand ki reputation ko nuksan pahuncha sakta hai.

questions.question: Influencer marketing mein 'false advertising' kya hai?

options.A: Influencer ka content bahut creative hai.
options.B: Product ya service ke baare mein galat ya misleading claims karna.
options.C: Sirf brand ka product accha nahi hai.
options.D: Influencer ne bahut acchi photo dali hai.

questions.explanation: False advertising illegal aur unethical hai, jismein consumers ko product ke baare mein galat jaankari di jaati hai.

questions.question: Social media platforms ki apni disclosure policies ka kya role hai?

options.A: Sirf platforms ko zyada followers dilana.
options.B: Regulatory bodies (ASCI, FTC) ke rules ko enforce karna aur users ko transparent experience dena.
options.D: Platforms ko ads se income kam karna.

questions.explanation: Platforms jaise Instagram aur YouTube ke paas apne built-in tools (Paid Partnership tag) aur policies hain jo disclosures ko facilitate karte hain aur regulatory compliance mein madad karte hain.

questions.question: Ek influencer contract mein 'termination clause' kyun shamil ki jaati hai?

options.A: Influencer ko terminate karne ke liye.
options.B: Kis conditions mein partnership ko khatam kiya ja sakta hai, yeh define karne ke liye.
options.C: Sirf contract ko lamba karne ke liye.
options.D: Influencer ko bonus dene ke liye.

questions.explanation: Termination clause parties ko certain conditions mein contract end karne ka option deti hai, jaise breach of contract ya unforeseen circumstances.

questions.question: Content submission ke baad brand ka pehla step kya hona chahiye?

options.A: Content ko immediately publish kar dena.
options.B: Content ko review karna aur brand guidelines aur brief se compare karna.
options.C: Influencer ko aur content banane ko kehna.

questions.explanation: Content review karna zaroori hai taaki yeh ensure ho sake ki content brand ke expectations aur guidelines ke according hai.

questions.question: Agar influencer ka content brand guidelines ke according nahi hai, toh kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Influencer ko constructive feedback dena aur revisions request karna.
options.D: Content ko khud edit kar dena.

questions.explanation: Constructive feedback dena aur revisions request karna professional tareeka hai taaki content ko sahi kiya ja sake.

questions.question: Campaign execution ke dauran 'regular communication' ka kya mahatva hai?

options.B: Updates, feedback aur kisi bhi issue ko timely address karne ke liye.

questions.explanation: Regular communication smooth campaign execution ke liye essential hai, jisse misunderstandings kam hoti hain aur problems jaldi solve ho jaati hain.

questions.question: Content schedule ko maintain karne ke liye kaun sa tool helpful ho sakta hai?

options.B: Spreadsheets (Excel, Google Sheets) ya project management tools (Asana, Trello).

questions.explanation: Spreadsheets aur project management tools content calendar, deadlines aur influencer deliverables ko track karne mein madad karte hain.

questions.question: Influencer content ko 'boost' karna (paid promotion) kyun faydemand ho sakta hai?

options.A: Sirf influencer ko zyada likes milte hain.
options.B: Organic reach badhane aur specific target audience tak pahunchne ke liye.
options.C: Content ko delete hone se bachane ke liye.

questions.explanation: Boosting influencer content paid ads ke through uski reach ko amplify karta hai aur brand ko specific demographics ya interests ko target karne ka mauka deta hai.

questions.question: Agar campaign ke dauran koi 'crisis' (jaise negative comments) ho jaye, toh kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Influencer ke saath collaborate karke timely aur transparent response dena.
options.D: Social media se gayab ho jana.

questions.explanation: Crisis management mein timely, honest aur collaborative response zaroori hai taaki negative impact ko minimize kiya ja sake.

questions.question: Influencer ke content ko 'repurpose' karne ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Original content ko alag formats ya platforms par dobara use karna.
options.D: Content ko sirf ek baar use karna.

questions.explanation: Repurposing content ka matlab hai ek piece of content ko alag-alag tarike se use karna, jaise ek video se short clips ya images nikal kar alag platforms par share karna.

questions.question: Influencer marketing mein 'whitelist access' ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: Influencer ko brand ke secret documents tak pahunch dena.
options.B: Brand ko influencer ke social media account se ads run karne ki permission dena.
options.C: Influencer ko brand ke products free mein dena.
options.D: Influencer ko brand ke office mein invite karna.

questions.explanation: Whitelist access brand ko influencer ke handle se ads run karne ki permission deta hai, jisse content ki reach aur targeting ko optimize kiya ja sakta hai.

questions.question: Campaign execution ke dauran 'A/B testing' ka kya role hai?

options.A: Sirf do alag influencers ko test karna.
options.B: Content ke do variations ko compare karke dekhna ki kaun sa zyada effective hai.
options.C: Brand ke do alag products ko test karna.

questions.explanation: A/B testing se brands content, CTAs ya visuals ke alag-alag versions ko test karke yeh determine kar sakte hain ki kaun sa version audience ke saath best resonate karta hai.

questions.question: Influencer campaign ko 'optimize' karne ke liye kya steps utha sakte hain?

options.B: Performance metrics ko analyze karna, content ya targeting ko adjust karna, aur influencer ke saath feedback loop maintain karna.
options.C: Campaign ko beech mein hi rok dena.

questions.explanation: Optimization mein ongoing monitoring, data analysis aur necessary adjustments shamil hote hain taaki campaign goals ko better achieve kiya ja sake.

questions.question: Influencer ke content ko 'cross-promote' karne ka kya fayda hai?

options.B: Content ki reach badhana aur alag-alag platforms par audience tak pahunchna.
options.D: Sirf brand ke website par traffic lana.

questions.explanation: Cross-promotion mein influencer content ko brand ke apne social media channels par bhi share karna shamil hai, jisse content ki visibility badhti hai.

questions.question: Influencer relationship management mein kya shamil hai?

options.B: Long-term relationships build karna, regular communication aur mutual respect.

questions.explanation: Strong influencer relationships long-term collaborations aur better campaign outcomes ke liye critical hain.

questions.question: Agar ek influencer deadline miss karta hai, toh brand ka response kya hona chahiye?

options.A: Influencer ko gusse wala email bhejna.
options.B: Politely reason poochhna aur revised deadline set karna.

questions.explanation: Professionalism maintain karna zaroori hai. Delays ho sakte hain, aur polite communication se solution nikalna chahiye.

questions.question: Campaign ke dauran 'real-time monitoring' kyun important hai?

options.A: Sirf data collect karne ke liye.
options.B: Performance ko track karna, issues ko identify karna aur timely adjustments karna.
options.C: Influencer ko control karne ke liye.

questions.explanation: Real-time monitoring se brands campaign ki health ko samajh sakte hain aur zarurat padne par immediate actions le sakte hain.

questions.question: Influencer ko 'feedback loop' mein shamil karne ka kya fayda hai?

options.A: Sirf influencer ko zyada kaam dena.
options.B: Influencer ko campaign ke results se अवगत कराना aur future collaborations ko improve karna.
options.D: Sirf brand ki internal meeting karna.

questions.explanation: Feedback loop se influencers ko unke kaam ki performance ka pata chalta hai aur woh future content ko optimize kar sakte hain, jisse long-term partnership strong hoti hai.

questions.question: Ek 'influencer marketing platform' ka campaign management mein kya role hai?

options.B: Influencer discovery se lekar campaign tracking, communication aur payment tak sab kuch streamline karna.

questions.explanation: Influencer marketing platforms end-to-end solutions provide karte hain, jisse campaign management efficient aur scalable ho jaata hai.

questions.question: Influencer marketing campaign ke liye sabse important KPI kya hai agar goal 'Sales' hai?

options.B: Engagement Rate

questions.explanation: Agar goal sales hai, toh Conversion Rate (kitne logon ne influencer ke content ke through purchase kiya) sabse direct aur relevant metric hai.

questions.question: ROI (Return on Investment) ko kaise calculate karte hain?

options.B: Cost / Revenue * 100

questions.explanation: ROI ek financial metric hai jo campaign se generate hue revenue ko uski cost se compare karta hai. Ye batata hai ki kitna profit hua investment ke mukabale.

questions.question: Campaign report mein kya shamil hona chahiye?

options.B: Campaign goals, KPIs, results, insights aur recommendations.

questions.explanation: Ek comprehensive campaign report campaign ki performance ka complete overview deti hai aur future strategies ke liye valuable insights provide karti hai.

questions.question: Agar campaign ka goal 'Website Traffic' hai, toh kaun sa metric sabse important hoga?

options.B: Click-Through Rate (CTR)

questions.explanation: CTR (Click-Through Rate) batata hai ki kitne logon ne influencer ke content mein diye gaye link par click kiya, jo website traffic ke liye direct metric hai.

questions.question: Google Analytics ka influencer marketing mein kya use hai?

options.A: Sirf influencers ki location track karna.
options.B: Influencer-generated traffic ko website par track karna, conversions aur user behavior analyze karna.

questions.explanation: Google Analytics brands ko influencer-driven website traffic ki performance ko detail mein analyze karne mein madad karta hai.

questions.question: Influencer marketing mein 'Cost Per Engagement' (CPE) kya hai?

options.B: Total campaign cost / Total engagements (likes, comments, shares)

questions.explanation: CPE batata hai ki ek single audience engagement ke liye brand ko kitna kharch karna pada, jo engagement-focused campaigns ke liye ek important metric hai.

questions.question: Campaign ke results ko 'benchmarks' se compare karna kyun zaroori hai?

options.B: Campaign ki relative performance ko judge karne aur improvements identify karne ke liye.
options.C: Competitors ko copy karne ke liye.

questions.explanation: Benchmarks (industry averages, previous campaigns) se comparison karne se pata chalta hai ki campaign kitna successful raha aur kahan scope for improvement hai.

questions.question: Brand Lift Studies kya measure karte hain?

options.B: Brand awareness, perception aur purchase intent mein changes.

questions.explanation: Brand Lift Studies surveys aur experiments ke through brand awareness, recall aur attitude jaise metrics mein influencer campaign ke impact ko measure karte hain.

questions.question: Influencer marketing mein 'Attribution Modeling' ka kya role hai?

options.B: Yeh determine karna ki kis influencer ya touchpoint ne conversion mein kitna contribute kiya.
options.D: Influencer ke followers ko count karna.

questions.explanation: Attribution modeling se brands samajh paate hain ki conversion journey mein influencer ka role kya tha, especially jab multiple touchpoints shamil hon.

questions.question: Campaign ke baad 'lessons learned' aur 'future recommendations' kyun important hain?

options.A: Sirf report ko lamba karne ke liye.
options.B: Future campaigns ko optimize karne aur strategy ko refine karne ke liye.
options.C: Influencer ko blame karne ke liye.

questions.explanation: Lessons learned aur recommendations continuous improvement cycle ka part hain, jisse har naya campaign pichle se behtar hota hai.

questions.question: Social media platform ke 'native analytics' tools ka kya fayda hai?

options.A: Sirf influencer ki personal details dekhna.
options.B: Engagement, reach, audience demographics jaise basic metrics ko track karna.

questions.explanation: Native analytics tools influencers aur brands ko platform-specific performance data provide karte hain jo basic tracking ke liye useful hai.

questions.question: Agar campaign ka goal 'Lead Generation' hai, toh kaun sa metric sabse relevant hoga?

options.B: Sign-ups, form submissions, downloads

questions.explanation: Lead generation campaigns ka aim potential customers ki contact information collect karna hota hai, isliye sign-ups aur form submissions direct indicators hain.

questions.question: Influencer marketing software (jaise CreatorIQ) ka kya fayda hai performance measurement mein?

options.B: Influencer discovery, campaign management aur advanced analytics ko automate aur streamline karna.

questions.explanation: Influencer marketing software end-to-end solutions provide karte hain, jismein performance tracking aur comprehensive reporting shamil hai.

questions.question: Campaign performance ko analyze karte samay 'qualitative data' ka kya mahatva hai?

options.A: Sirf numbers par focus karna chahiye.
options.B: Comments ki tone, sentiment aur audience ke feedback ko samajhna, jo numbers nahi bata sakte.

questions.explanation: Qualitative data (jaise comments, reviews) audience ke sentiment aur perception ki deeper insights provide karta hai jo quantitative metrics miss kar sakte hain.

questions.question: Ek successful influencer campaign ke baad 'post-campaign analysis' kyun zaroori hai?

options.A: Campaign ko bhool jane ke liye.
options.B: Campaign ki overall effectiveness ko evaluate karna aur future strategies ke liye insights gather karna.
options.C: Sirf influencer ko payment karne ke liye.
options.D: New campaign start karne ke liye.

questions.explanation: Post-campaign analysis se brands ko pata chalta hai ki kya accha kaam kiya aur kya improve kiya ja sakta hai, jisse future investments aur effective hote hain.

questions.question: Agar ek influencer campaign ka ROI negative aaya hai, toh iska kya matlab hai?

options.B: Campaign ne jitna paisa invest kiya usse kam revenue ya value generate ki.
options.C: Influencer ne bahut accha kaam kiya.

questions.explanation: Negative ROI ka matlab hai ki campaign par kiya gaya kharch usse milne wale returns se zyada tha, yaani campaign profitable nahi raha.
